articles.title: Institutional Investors Shift to Ethereum (ETH) Following Successful Shapella Upgrade: CoinShares
articles.description: Digital assets manager CoinShares says institutional investors are diving into leading smart contract platform Ethereum (ETH) after its successful Shapella upgrade. In its latest Digital Asset Fund Flows Weekly Report, CoinShares finds that institutional ETH investment products saw inflows of $17 million last week, a sign of investor bullishness, according to the firm. “Ethereum saw inflows...

articles.title: Why Monero may thrive in an environment underpinned by CBDC regime
articles.description: Monero’s privacy centric nature makes it a highly attractive proposition for the masses especially when governments exercise draconian levels of control

articles.title: Ethereum ICO participant awakes after 7.7 years of dormancy
articles.description: The Ethereum ICO participant transferred only one ether to a new address — which some speculate indicates a test transaction.
